# Completions - PowerShell Script

Generate a PowerShell completion script for the Powerlines command-line interface.

## Usage

The `script` command can be executed using the following syntax:

<details>
<summary>Using npm:</summary>

```sh
npx powerlines completions powershell script <path> [options]
npx powerlines completions powershell script [options] <path>
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using yarn:</summary>

```sh
yarn exec powerlines completions powershell script <path> [options]
yarn exec powerlines completions powershell script [options] <path>
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using pnpm:</summary>

```sh
pnpm exec powerlines completions powershell script <path> [options]
pnpm exec powerlines completions powershell script [options] <path>
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using bun:</summary>

```sh
bun x powerlines completions powershell script <path> [options]
bun x powerlines completions powershell script [options] <path>
```

</details>
